recommendations: shell_tool_preference_violations has appeared at 5-6 unit-count for six consecutive cycles with no downward trajectory — behavioral recommendations have been exhausted; escalate to enforcement-level intervention (hook or settings allowlist restriction on Bash calls whose targets are .json/.toml/.md files that have a Read equivalent) rather than repeating the behavioral nudge
